description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a solid, cylindrical black metal head with a flat striking face on one end and a rounded peen on the opposite side, characteristic of a ball-peen hammer. The head is securely attached to a smoothly finished, slightly curved wooden handle, which displays a natural wood grain pattern and a warm brown hue. The handle is ergonomically shaped, tapering slightly towards the end for a comfortable grip and better control during use. The metal head has a glossy finish, reflecting light, while the wooden handle appears matte and subtly textured. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or damage on the hammer, indicating it is in pristine condition. This tool is commonly used for metalworking, driving punches, and shaping metal in urban workshops, garages, or construction sites.
description: A pristine ball-peen hammer with a glossy black metal head and a smoothly finished, curved wooden handle. The tool is well-crafted, with no visible wear or markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the cylindrical black metal head with both the flat face and rounded peen visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the width of the hammer head and the attachment point of the handle, with the rounded peen clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the full profile of the hammer head, including the flat striking face.
description_view_3: Handle-end view focusing on the ergonomic shape and wood grain of the handle, with the hammer head seen from behind.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish and visible wood grain, ergonomically shaped for grip.
attribute_head_type: Ball-peen hammer head with a flat striking face on one end and a rounded peen on the other, made of glossy black metal.
